# **\--Vraki UOM--**

## **Vraki UOM**

* **Adrian (the same one who helped create the calendar) decided to standardize all UOMs based on the best UOMs being used around—which all happened to be from Blood due to their constant hunting nature.**  
* **Temperature, Weight, Distance, Volume & Time UOM can be found on the [World Calendar & UOM.](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tJy2C_-z7Xsqmm1GEYcYjMLbCUYr6D0gb0TM2Vo5200/edit#gid=1805800130)**


# **\--Day & Night--**

## **Vraki Day**

* **The Sun behaves similarly to our Sun.**  
* **The day is divided into four sections, with each inner section divided into two (times are approximate due to seasons)**  
  * **Low vs High refers to the amount of Nari crystals ratio used in the mixture for each time chunk**

**![image.png][image1]**

## **Vraki Night**

* **The moon is similar to Earth, except for its color.**  
  * **See Timekeeper for more information.**  
  * **The night sky uses the color palette in the Moon section. \#61f878 ![image.png][image2]**  
    * **If you focus the moonlight on a smaller point, you can make any living being glow within its shine. More info on World Timeline.**  
* **The night has a similar design to daytime.**  
  * **Low vs High refers to the ratio of Nari crystals used in the mixture for each time chunk.**

**![image.png][image3]**

# **\--Vraki Calendar & Birth Age--**

## **Vraki Calendar**

* **Created and standardized by ForWay City. See World Timeline for more information.**  
* **On every Asa 1st, Forway also releases a lunar mapping for Hunters, farmers, adventurers, and others who depend on the lunar phases to gauge environmental tendencies for a measly twenty pearls.**  
* **See the [Isekai World Calendar](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1tJy2C_-z7Xsqmm1GEYcYjMLbCUYr6D0gb0TM2Vo5200/edit#gid=0) for more information.**

## **Year**

* **4 Months**  
* **73 Weeks**  
* **365 Days**

## **Month**

* **Named after the three courtroom scientists alongside the man who kickstarted the rebellion that led to the Prosperity Treaty (Freeish Paulin)**  
* **Asa**  
  * **Represents Spring**  
  * **85 Days**  
  * **17 Weeks**  
* **Paulin**  
  * **Represents Summer**  
  * **110 Days**  
  * **22 Weeks**  
* **Moacir**  
  * **Represents Fall**  
  * **85 Days**  
  * **17 Weeks**  
* **Adrian**  
  * **Represents Winter**  
  * **85 Days**  
  * **17 Weeks**

## **Week**

* **Every week has 5 Days**  
* **Freeday**  
  * **1st day of the week.**  
  * **From Freeish Kingdom. They get the first day of the working week because they were where the rebellion began.**  
* **Tollday**  
  * **2nd day of the week.**  
  * **Work Day.**  
  * **Tolerideme was the second Kingdom to join.**  
* **Sannday**  
  * **3rd day of the week.**  
  * **Work Day.**  
  * **Sanbi was third.**  
* **Gannday**  
  * **4th day of the week.**  
  * **Work Day.**  
  * **Gandew Kingdom was the last kingdom to join.**  
* **ForrDay**  
  * **1st day of the week.**  
  * **Forward Day.**  
  * **A day when all embassies are closed to the public.**

## **Birth Age**

  **Age is the number of years a person has been alive as of the current year. Day/Month has no meaning to a person's age.**

# **\--Seasons--**

## **Average Temperature Table**

|  | Δ0km | Δ2km | Δ4km | Δ6km | Δ8km |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Asa (Spring)** | **20 ºC** | **15 ºC** | **10 ºC** | **0 ºC** | **\-10 ºC** |
| **Paulin (Summer)** | **30 ºC** | **25 ºC** | **20 ºC** | **10 ºC** | **0 ºC** |
| **Moacir (Fall)** | **15 ºC** | **10 ºC** | **5 ºC** | **\-5 ºC** | **\-15 ºC** |
| **Adrian (Winter)** | **10 ºC** | **5 ºC** | **0 ºC** | **\-10 ºC** | **\-20 ºC** |

**​**

## **Average Humidity Table**  

|  | Δ0km\* | Δ2km | Δ4km | Δ6km | Δ8km |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **Asa (Spring)** | **85%** | **75%** | **65%** | **50%** | **40%** |
| **Paulin (Summer)** | **90%** | **80%** | **70%** | **55%** | **45%** |
| **Moacir (Fall)** | **85%** | **75%** | **65%** | **50%** | **40%** |
| **Adrian (Winter)** | **75%** | **65%** | **55%** | **40%** | **30%** |

**\*If close to water like Sanbi Kingdom. If not, treat like Δ1km**

# **\--Name Schema--**

## **Four Kingdoms**

* **To make names, contracts, and negotiations easier, Forway implemented a naming schema that began with any kingdom child born after the prosperity treaty came into effect in 671 A.G.**  
* **NAME PLACE GUILD**  
  * **Given by parents at birth. Uniqueness and name characteristics vary by region.**  
  * **City of origin or main residence.**  
    * **City of origin or main residence.**  
    * **Often associated with where their primary guild is located.**  
  * **Guild Name. If participating in multiple guilds, then any of them.**  
    * **If the guild name is described as CITY-GUILD, and the city is the current place of the badge owner, then it is not written (e.g., Itagiba Sanbi Royal vs Itagiba Sanbi Sanbi-Royal)**  
    * **If not participating in any guild, this part of the name is skipped.**

# **\--Map--**


## **Isekai History**

* **It is unknown how old the planet is, but it is estimated to be billions of years old.**

## **Isekai Global Map**

* **The World Map created by the Four Kingdoms is located in the southern part of the planet.**

**![image.png][image4]![image.png][image5]**

## **Four Kingdoms**

* **See the Four Kingdoms Map**

## **Unknown Regions**

* **See Four Kingdoms Metadata Map**
